Prefix below the model cache minimum
or no/misplaced breakpoint -> nothing cached

Bursty/gappy traffic
use 1h TTL or pre-warm; re-check break-even

span.p:
Breakpoint past the shared prefix
each request writes a distinct entry, never reads
